title: TotemGrabber
description: Smart offhand management mod that auto-focuses Totems, supports instant Shift-click swapping, and falls back to a shield when needed - keeping you PvP-ready at all times.
body:
# TotemGrabber

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3e0c954913de4daeb130e34ed2c02006e2008fc_0.webp)

A small utility mod for PvP players who want faster offhand management without the fumbling.

When you open your inventory, TotemGrabber automatically focuses a Totem of Undying so you can swap it to your offhand in one click. No totem? It falls back to your shield instead. That's it - no config screens, no keybinds to memorize, just faster swaps when it counts.

---
![Video](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa59f5324dfb9bc1aa988743a000022d79994544.gif)
![Video2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67eed99541c5ee9067dc5d736d1b404eaef216ad.gif)
![Video3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab476b4ec4214690c524dc63f1ac61ed89391fa1.gif)
---

## Features

- Auto-focuses a totem when inventory opens
- Shift + Left Click to move it to offhand instantly
- Falls back to shield if no totems are available
- Adjustable delay via command
- Lightweight - no overhead during normal gameplay

---

## Commands

```
/totemgrabber on
/totemgrabber off
/totemgrabber toggle
/totemgrabber status
/totemgrabber delay <ms>
```

Delay range: `50ms → 2000ms` — Default: `50ms`

---

## How it works

Open inventory → totem gets focused → Shift + Click → offhand. If no totem is found, the mod selects your shield automatically instead, This not work like AutoTotem Instant Totem hold, user took almost <500ms-1s to hold new totem, maybe more time for new user...

---

## Useful for

- Crystal PvP
- Survival combat
- 1v1 fights
- Any situation where a slow offhand swap gets you killed

---

## Compatibility

- Fabric only
- Works with most PvP mods
- May conflict with other auto-offhand mods
- Not recommended for competitive servers with strict anti-cheat rules — use responsibly

---
